title: NCLEX Preparation
catalogDescription: The course will provide a thorough review of nursing concepts, critical thinking skills, and test-taking strategies essential for success on the NCLEX-RN or NCLEX-PN exams. Through lectures, practice exams, and simulated clinical scenarios, students will reinforce their knowledge and build confidence in their ability to pass the exam. Emphasis will be placed on understanding the exam format, mastering content areas, and developing effective study habits.
